articles.author: Michael Wayland
articles.title: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants - CNBC
articles.description: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.
articles.content:
Toyota Motor on Monday announced it would spend $1 billion at two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.
The new investments include $800 mi… [+1704 chars]
